reviews.comment:
Ayer tipo 21 :30  hs había   muchos autos,y un solo playero!!! Le pregunte que pasaba tanta demora y me dice"estoy solo"  como puede ser?? Con el calor q hacía el hombre iba de acá para alla .  .una vergüenza!  . Más en estas fechas .pongan más reemplazos!!

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday around 9:30 pm there were many cars, and only one attendant! I asked him what was causing the long delay and he said, "I'm alone." How is that possible? With the heat, the man was running back and forth... a disgrace! Especially at this time of year. Get more replacements!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxbWFtTmlOWEpCYTJaVmFIRktUWE5pTjBOck1XYxAB

reviews.comment:
La señora Lorena en la parte de la cafeteria muy mal educada para atender. Ni siquiera devolvio el saludo ni saco la vista del celular cuando le hicimos una pregunta. Queriamos pasar al baño y no habia problema alguno en comprar lo que haya que comprar. Nos trato y contesto mal. Un poco de modales al menos!

(Translated by Google)
Mrs. Lorena in the cafeteria was very rude. She didn't even return our greeting or look up from her phone when we asked her a question. We wanted to use the restroom and had no problem buying anything we needed. She treated us and answered us rudely. A little bit of manners would be nice!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xRMlpEZHpWMDQ1VXpSMmQwbG9XREZKVWw5ck9XYxAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar, viernes 21/11/2025 a las 3 am y no había nadie, aplaudí toque la puerta y no pude cargar combustible. Me fui a la Axion

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up on Friday, November 21, 2025, at 3:00 AM, and there was no one there. I clapped, knocked on the door, and couldn't get fuel. I went to the Axion station.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas tardes Daian, habiendo tomado conocimiento de tu reclamo, se efectuó una investigación y se procedió en consecuencia.
Disculpas por las molestias ocasionadas.

reviews.comment:
Buenas tardes, estoy esperando aproximadamente 15 minutos que llegue mi pago realizado por QR, en el cual en mi telefono sale que ya esta aprobado pero no lo toma el sistema.
Muy lento el sistema, mucha perdida de tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Good afternoon, I've been waiting approximately 15 minutes for my QR code payment to arrive. My phone shows it's approved, but the system isn't processing it.
The system is very slow; it's a huge waste of time.
